title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## Total greenhouse gas emissions rise 3.0 percent in the September 2023 quarter
Seasonally adjusted greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions for industry and household increased 3.0 percent in the September 2023 quarter.

## Household living-costs price indexes: December 2023 quarter
Household living-costs price indexes (HLPIs) provide insights into the inflation experienced by 13 different household groups: beneficiaries, Māori, income quintiles (five groups), expenditure quintiles (five groups), and superannuitants. We publish an all-households HLPI for comparison.

## Property transfer statistics: December 2023 quarter
Property transfer statistics are based mainly on land transfer tax statements. They capture property transfers by New Zealanders and overseas people. This includes information on the citizenship, visa status, or tax residency of people and companies involved in property transfers.

## Exports and imports down compared with 2022
Annual goods exports were valued at $68.7 billion in the year ended December 2023, down $3.3 billion (4.5 percent) from the year ended December 2022.

## Employment indicators: December 2023
Employment indicators provide an early indication of changes in the labour market.

## Overseas merchandise trade: December 2023
Overseas merchandise trade statistics provide information on imports and exports of merchandise goods between New Zealand and other countries.

## Business count indicators: December 2023
Business count indicators provide monthly counts of businesses grouped by industry and region.

## Help shape the future of industrial classifications in Aotearoa New Zealand
Stats NZ Tatauranga Aotearoa is seeking feedback to help shape the future of the industrial classification used in Aotearoa New Zealand.

## Information for Māori about the experimental administrative population census
Brings together information that is most directly relevant to iwi-Māori to support their use of the data and involvement in the development of the administrative population census.

## National accounts (income, saving, assets, and liabilities): Sources and methods (fourth edition)
Describes the data sources and compilation methods used in estimating the quarterly national accounts (income, saving, assets, and liabilities).

## Household saving steady in the September 2023 quarter
New Zealand household saving was $856 million in the September 2023 quarter, relatively unchanged from June 2023 quarter levels.

## Household net worth increases 0.2 percent in the September 2023 quarter
Household net worth increased 0.2 percent ($5.3 billion) in the September 2023 quarter following a period of decline from the March 2022 quarter.
